response.justification: Szabo has 20 years of solid engineering experience across multiple domains and is currently working on AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq, showing emerging alignment with AI work. However, the resume lacks the recognized AI expertise, strategic advisory experience, and demonstrated AI products that the Principal Engineer role requires. He appears to be a strong full-stack engineer with recent AI infrastructure exposure rather than an established AI strategy specialist.
strengths: 20 years of diverse software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded systems with platform-building capability (GISCollective founder)
Current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks demonstrates emerging AI technology expertise and hands-on AI development
Proven mentoring and knowledge-sharing track record through workshops, conference talks, and structured courses on engineering practices
concerns: No Master's or PhD in AI-related field, which is a preferred qualification for a specialized AI strategy role
Limited evidence of recognized AI expertise or demonstrated products built primarily with AI technology
No clear evidence of strategic customer advisory work or external thought leadership in AI and cloud strategy domains

key_factors.factor: Current AI infrastructure work at re:cinq
